# input-validation-storage

## Description

Internal input validation library for managing state in Nordic / Node applications. This library is designed to be used internally by input-validation-enforcer and @meli/input-validation to track and enforce input validation.

The library implements a scope concept that differentiates between SDK calls and input access across different packages. It separates calls made in application code from those made within internal libraries of a specific application, allowing for proper validation tracking and enforcement in different contexts.

## Usage

### Install

```sh
npm install --save @meli/input-validation-storage
```

### Example

```js
import { ValidationState } from '@meli/input-validation-storage';

// Run code within a validation context
ValidationState.run(() => {
  // Your validation logic here
});

// Check if an input is being validated
const isCurrentlyValidating = ValidationState.isValidating(input);

// Check if a property has been validated
const isPropertyValid = ValidationState.isPropertyValidated(input, 'propertyName');

// Validate in current scope
const isValidInScope = ValidationState.validateInScope(input, 'propertyName');
```

### Tests

```sh
npm run test
```
